title: A Town Festival and Its Challenges
article_text: The citizens of a small town will celebrate a special occasion in the main square next week. I am familiar with the arrangement because my friend is the editor of the local newspaper. Normally, we see a beautiful gold statue there, but someone will remove it for the event. The temperature is high, so the organizers must load cold water for the troop of volunteers. A technical problem could destroy the sound system if we ignore it. The civil affair has a domestic focus, and it will generate a good sight for everyone. I have seen the skin of the old buildings, and it reminds me of the city's history. The belief that everyone should help is strong among the citizens. We must locate the prison near the square and remind visitors to stay away. The gift from the town will remind us of this happy occasion forever.

sentences.zh: 下星期，一个小镇的市民将在主广场庆祝一个特殊的场合。

image_prompts: A small town square with a statue and people preparing for a festival, bright sunny day.
A person looking at a newspaper with an editor friend, discussing plans.
A gold statue being moved by workers in a town square.
Volunteers loading bottles of water into a truck under a hot sun.
A sound system with a warning sign, a technician looking worried.
A family watching a parade in a town square with flags and decorations.
An old building with peeling paint, a person touching the wall thoughtfully.
A group of citizens holding hands in a circle, looking happy and united.
A prison building near a town square with a sign saying 'Keep Away'.
A person receiving a gift box from a town official, smiling in the square.
